zh.lifeSummary: 當Adrian Fortescue於1476年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾薩爾登時，他的父親John Fortescue the Younger42歲，母親Lady Alice Boleyn38歲。他於大約1500年與Anne Stonor在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年7月8日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adrian Fortescue于1476年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾薩爾登时，他的父亲John Fortescue the Younger42岁，母亲Lady Alice Boleyn38岁。他于大约1500年与Anne Stonor在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年7月8日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨。

nameMeanings.name: Fortescue
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French fort ‘strong’ + escu ‘shield’.
History: A family of this name claim descent from Radulfus Fortescu who is recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holding lands at Modbury (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Adrian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of the Latin name Hadrianus ‘man from Hadria’. Hadria was a town in northern Italy, which gave its name to the Adriatic Sea; it is of unknown derivation. The initial H- has always been very volatile. The name was borne by the Roman emperor Publius Aelius Hadrianus , during whose reign ( ad 117–138 ) Hadrian's Wall was built across northern England. The name was later taken by several early popes, including the only English pope, Nicholas Breakspeare (Adrian IV). It was in early use among immigrants from the Low Countries, and is found in some English regions from the mid-16th century. It has enjoyed considerable popularity in the English-speaking world since the late 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Adrian Fortescue was born in 1476, in Salden, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Fortescue the Younger, was 42 and his mother, Lady Alice Boleyn, was 38. He married Anne Stonor about 1500, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 8 July 1539, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adrian Fortescue est né en 1476, à Salden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Fortescue the Younger, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Boleyn, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Anne Stonor environ 1500, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1539, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adrian Fortescue 1476 in Salden, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fortescue the Younger 42 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Boleyn 38. Er hat um 1500 in Oxfordshire, England Anne Stonor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juli 1539 im Alter von 63 Jahren in City of London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adrian Fortescue è nato il nel 1476 nel Salden, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Fortescue the Younger, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Boleyn, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Anne Stonor circa 1500, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 8 luglio 1539, nel City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adrian Fortescueが1476年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアサルデンで生まれた時，父John Fortescue the Youngerは42歳，母Lady Alice Boleynは38歳であった。約1500年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでAnne Stonorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年7月8日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツにて埋葬された。

ko.Burton, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠
ko.lifeSummary: Adrian Fortescue(이)가 1476년 영국 벅잉함실르 살든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fortescue the Younger(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Boleyn(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Anne Stonor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adrian Fortescue nasceu em 1476, em Salden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fortescue the Younger, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Boleyn, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Stonor aproximadamente 1500, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1539, em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Burton, Sussex, England: буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adrian Fortescue родился в 1476 г. в местности салден, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fortescue the Younger было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Boleyn, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Stonor около 1500 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 8 июля 1539 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adrian Fortescue nació en 1476, en Salden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fortescue the Younger, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Boleyn, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Anne Stonor aproximadamente 1500, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de julio de 1539, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
